examples: "You deserve to be a baroness, "said the collar.
"Loneliness touches almost every one of us at some point," its Minister for Loneliness Baroness Barran said.
The suggestion comes a day after the death of 87-year-old Baroness Thatcher as a result of a stroke.
However, Ulster Unionist Party leader Mike Nesbitt said Baroness Thatcher was "a colossus of conviction politics".
